events.title: Besant Nagar Beach Cleanup Drive
events.location: Besant Nagar Beach, Elliot's Beach, Chennai
events.description: Join 200+ volunteers for a massive shoreline cleanup. Help remove plastic waste and microplastics from one of Chennai's most iconic beaches. Gloves and bags provided.

events.title: Adyar Eco Park – 1000 Trees Plantation
events.description: Be part of Chennai's urban reforestation effort! Plant native species like Neem, Peepal, and Banyan. Each sapling absorbs ~22 kg CO₂ per year. Refreshments provided.

events.title: IIT Madras – Carbon Neutrality Workshop
events.location: IC & SR Auditorium, IIT Madras, Chennai
events.description: A full-day hands-on workshop on measuring your carbon footprint, understanding emission sources, and building personal action plans. Led by climate scientists from IIT Madras.

events.title: Marina to Mylapore Eco Cycling Rally
events.description: Ride 12 km from Marina to Mylapore and back! Promote zero-emission transport and win eco-prizes. Helmets mandatory. Open to all age groups.

events.title: Climate Action Seminar – Road to Net Zero
events.location: Anna University Convention Centre, Guindy, Chennai
events.description: Industry leaders and environmentalists discuss India's Net Zero 2070 target, Chennai's role, and what students can do. Panel discussion + Q&A session.

events.title: Pallikaranai Marshland Restoration
events.description: Help restore one of Chennai's last remaining wetlands! Activities include invasive species removal, native plant seeding, and bird habitat setup. A unique hands-on conservation experience.

events.title: Solar Energy for Homes – DIY Workshop
events.description: Learn how rooftop solar panels work, calculate your home's solar potential, and understand government subsidies. Hands-on demo with mini solar kits included.

events.title: OMR Corridor – Tree Guard Installation
events.description: Protect newly planted saplings along the IT corridor by installing tree guards. Each tree saved removes 25+ kg CO₂ annually. Bring a friend!

events.title: E-Waste Collection Drive – Velachery
events.description: Drop off old electronics, batteries, and cables for responsible recycling. E-waste in landfills releases toxic CO₂ and heavy metals. Free drop-off, certificates provided.

events.title: Green Campus Challenge – Inter-College
events.description: Compete across colleges in sustainability challenges: waste audit, carbon calculation, upcycling, and eco-quiz. Winning team gets ₹50,000 green fund!

news.title: Chennai Metro Expansion to Cut City's Carbon Emissions by 12%
news.summary: The Phase-2 expansion of Chennai Metro Rail, covering 118.9 km, is projected to reduce the city's transport emissions by 12% once fully operational. Officials say it will take 2 lakh vehicles off the road daily.

news.title: Tamil Nadu Achieves 50% Renewable Energy Milestone
news.summary: Tamil Nadu has crossed the 50% mark in renewable energy generation, driven by massive wind and solar installations in southern districts. Chennai's rooftop solar adoption surged 34% this year.

news.title: Miyawaki Forests Sprout Across Chennai's IT Corridor
news.summary: Over 15 Miyawaki micro-forests have been planted along Chennai's OMR stretch in the past year, each containing 300-800 native trees. These dense forests absorb CO₂ 30x faster than conventional plantations.

news.title: Chennai Corporation Launches Free Compost Bins for 10,000 Homes
news.summary: In a push towards zero-waste, the Greater Chennai Corporation is distributing free composting bins to households across 15 zones. Composting can reduce a family's carbon footprint by 0.5 tonnes per year.

news.title: Electric Bus Fleet Doubles: TNSTC Adds 500 New EV Buses
news.summary: Tamil Nadu State Transport Corporation has inducted 500 electric buses, with 200 deployed in Chennai alone. Each e-bus saves 60 tonnes of CO₂ annually compared to diesel counterparts.

news.title: Students Lead Carbon-Neutral Campus Movement in Chennai
news.summary: A coalition of 12 Chennai colleges has pledged to achieve carbon neutrality by 2030. Initiatives include solar-powered hostels, bicycle-only zones, and campus food forests.

news.title: Cooum River Restoration Shows Promising Results in Emission Reduction
news.summary: The ongoing Cooum River restoration project has reduced methane emissions from the river by 40% in treated stretches. Healthy rivers act as carbon sinks, absorbing CO₂ from the atmosphere.

news.title: How Chennai's Cyclists Are Saving 500 Tonnes of CO₂ Monthly
news.summary: Chennai's growing cycling community, now 15,000+ strong, collectively prevents an estimated 500 tonnes of CO₂ emissions every month by choosing pedals over petrol.
